case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 1260-1440s emailservice metrics. Extreme diskio spikes (dev >10B) confirm resource exhaustion as root cause. Traces show elevated latency but are propagation effects. Ranking: emailservice_diskio.

Final RCA confirms emailservice diskio exhaustion as root cause. Traces show latency propagation to checkoutservice and currencyservice. Ranking prioritizes emailservice diskio, followed by propagated latency effects.
